Ntc Of Petition To Compel Mandatory Arbitration. Stay Proceedings In The Action And Recover Contractual Attorneys' Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Nov-16-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on defendant Robert LaLanne's petition to compel mandatory arbitration, stay proceedings and for attorney fees.
Dept. 220, Judge: James J. McBride, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Cynthia Poliseri, #11448.

Jiyun Cameron Lee, Esq. appeared for plaintiff LaLanne Ranch Partnership
Christopher E. Andreas, Esq. appeared with defendant Robert LaLanne.

After hearing argument by counsel, and good cause appearing, defendant's petition to compel mandatory arbitration is GRANTED, the matter is hereby STAYED and the case shall be arbitrated with the American Arbitration Association. Plaintiff shall initiate arbitration with AAA on or before December 1, 2011.

It is further Orderd that defendant's request for attorney fees is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall pay defendant attorney fees in the amount of $2,140.00. This amount is payable to defendant within thirty (30) days of notice of entry of order.

Order After Hearing was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Ntc Of Petition To Compel Mandatory Arbitration. Stay Proceedings In The Action And Recover Contractual Attorneys' Fees And Costs
